chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD R.A No. 78 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA-2056/2016 2. For orders on CMA-1848/2016 3. For orders on CMA-1849/2016 4. For katcha peshi. 5. For hearing of CMA-1513/2016 08.12.2016. Mr. Abdul Ghafoor Hakro, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Arsahd S. Pathan, Advocate for respondents No.1 and 2 = Mr. Abdul Ghafoor Hakro, the learned Counsel for applicant does not press this revision application, for which he has already filed CMA No.2056/2016 for withdrawing the same simplicitor. At this juncture, Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan, Advocate representing the respondents No.1 and 2 states that he has also moved an application being CMA No.1849/2016, under Order XXIII Rule 3 CPC. Be that as it may, the name of Mr. Abdul Ghafoor Hakro, Advocate appears in the Vakalatnama of his firm, which does empower him to withdraw and compromise this case. Accordingly, this revision application is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed applications (if any) with no order as to costs. JUDGE Shahid
